name: INTERFACE INC
summary: PART I General References in this Annual Report on Form 10-K to Interface, the Company, we, our, ours and us refer to Interface, Inc. and its subsidiaries or any of them, unless the context requires otherwise. Interface, Inc. was incorporated in Georgia in 1973 and is a global flooring solutions company offering an integrated portfolio of flooring products to customers, including carpet tile, luxury vinyl tile (LVT), nora rubber flooring, and FLOR premium area rugs.
